diagrams.title: A* Search Node Expansion Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how A* selects nodes from OPEN set, expands them, and manages CLOSED set
diagrams.purpose: Understanding A* algorithm mechanics and data structure management

diagrams.title: Greedy vs A* Search Behavior
diagrams.description: Comparison showing Greedy following heuristic guidance vs A* balancing path cost and heuristic
elements: f(n), g(n), h(n) values at nodes
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing why Greedy fails and A* succeeds in finding optimal solutions

diagrams.title: Heuristic Comparison: 8-Puzzle
diagrams.description: Two admissible heuristics - misplaced tiles vs Manhattan distance
diagrams.purpose: Understanding admissible heuristics and dominance relationship

visuals.title: Informed Search Strategies
visuals.description: Visual diagram for informed search strategies
